title: tectaria biformis
intro: Tectaria biformis, also known as the two-formed fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, characterized by its unique bipinnate fronds. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Tectaria biformis include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Tectaria biformis is often made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
